cluster_geo_profile.description: This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on methodological frameworks, dataset benchmarking, and future research directions for nexus systems. Key innovation patterns emphasize benchmarking, conditions limitations, multiyear dataset. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on renewable energy grid integration, solar/wind power forecasting, and battery storage optimization. Key innovation patterns emphasize ai, optimization, management. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on practical feasibility studies, pilot project implementations, and field validation of AI solutions. Key innovation patterns emphasize pilot, solution, pilot project. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on collaborative water-energy nexus modeling and technological deployment strategies. Key innovation patterns emphasize insights, strong, utility. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on practical feasibility studies, pilot project implementations, and field validation of AI solutions. Key innovation patterns emphasize project, sensors model, evaluation. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on large-scale resource conservation, water-energy savings maximization, and decarbonization strategies. Key innovation patterns emphasize scale, phase, water savings. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

method: chi-square test of independence + row percentages

cluster_geo_profile.description: This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on methodological frameworks, dataset benchmarking, and future research directions for nexus systems. Key innovation patterns emphasize benchmarking, conditions limitations, multiyear dataset. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on renewable energy grid integration, solar/wind power forecasting, and battery storage optimization. Key innovation patterns emphasize ai, optimization, management. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on practical feasibility studies, pilot project implementations, and field validation of AI solutions. Key innovation patterns emphasize pilot, solution, pilot project. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on collaborative water-energy nexus modeling and technological deployment strategies. Key innovation patterns emphasize insights, strong, utility. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on practical feasibility studies, pilot project implementations, and field validation of AI solutions. Key innovation patterns emphasize project, sensors model, evaluation. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

This cluster represents a core research and development hub focused on large-scale resource conservation, water-energy savings maximization, and decarbonization strategies. Key innovation patterns emphasize scale, phase, water savings. Projects in this group see heavy deployment and academic-industry collaboration within Asia-Pacific, Europe.

method: chi-square test of independence + row percentages
